this is a younger tree but the branches are close to the ground, making it easier to pluck from. Since it's smaller - it takes longer to ripen its fruit. Access: Public.

at the end of the loop is the tree with nice sweet seedy tiny figs on it! Be sure to grab a fruit picker - because some are high - although a couple are low enough to grab at to eat. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-unknown.
